description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the docker image with a docker:dind service and a global before_script that installs make via apk and runs make login-ci. Define two stages: build and push. In the build stage add a build job that runs make build then make push-ci. In the push stage add a push job that runs in the docker-hub environment, is limited to the master branch, must be triggered manually, and executes make login-ci-hub, make pull-ci, and make push. No caches or artifacts are defined.
